extract: Grass Knot (Japanese: くさむすび Grass Knot) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation IV that deals varying damage. It is: TM86 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TR77 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM081 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. It may be a counterpart to the move Low Kick.
